title: Clash Royale

fun_fact: Over 70 million downloads worldwide!

title: One Punch Man: Road to Hero 2.0
description: Strategic RPG with One Punch Man characters.
fun_fact: Collect all heroes and monsters from the series!

title: Attack on Titan: Assault
description: Experience ODM gear combat against Titans.
fun_fact: Features 3D maneuver gear mechanics!

title: Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot Action RPG
description: Relive Goku's adventures in this action RPG.
fun_fact: Covers the entire DBZ story from Saiyan to Buu saga!

title: Saint Seiya: Legend of Justice
description: Tactical RPG featuring iconic Bronze Saints.
fun_fact: Features classic Cloth designs from the manga!

title: Digimon ReArise
description: Raise and digivolve Digimon in this RPG adventure.
fun_fact: Features Digimon from all generations!

title: Yo-kai Watch World
description: Find and befriend Yo-kai in the real world with AR.
fun_fact: Pokemon GO-style gameplay with Yo-kai!

title: CarX Drift Racing 2
description: Realistic drift racing with deep car customization.
fun_fact: Features physics praised by real drift drivers!

title: GRID Autosport
description: Console-quality racing brought to mobile.
fun_fact: Full console game ported perfectly to mobile!

title: Rush Rally 3
description: Authentic rally racing with realistic physics.
fun_fact: Made by a solo developer who's a rally fan!

title: Need for Speed: No Limits
description: Street racing with the iconic NFS style.
fun_fact: Features real licensed supercars!

title: Rebel Racing
description: West Coast street racing with real-time multiplayer.
fun_fact: Race on California's most iconic roads!

title: CSR Racing 2
description: Drag racing with hyper-realistic supercars.
fun_fact: Features AR mode to see cars in your garage!

title: Top Drives
description: Car-collecting card game with racing strategy.
fun_fact: Features over 2,000 real licensed cars!

title: Motorsport Manager Mobile 3
description: Manage your own motorsport racing team.
fun_fact: Design and build your own cars!

title: Toca Life: World
description: Create stories and play in a digital dollhouse world.

title: My Talking Tom 2
description: Care for your virtual cat Tom with mini-games.
fun_fact: Over 1 billion downloads in the series!

title: My Talking Angela 2
description: Care for Angela with fashion and dance mini-games.
fun_fact: Features AR filters and makeup options!

title: Pou
description: Care for your alien pet Pou in this casual classic.
fun_fact: One of the longest-running mobile pet games!

title: My Boo
description: Adopt and care for your virtual monster pet.
fun_fact: Your Boo can have babies!

title: Dragon Mania Legends
description: Breed and train over 900 unique dragons.
fun_fact: Endless dragon breeding combinations!

title: Merge Mansion
description: Merge items to renovate the mansion and uncover secrets.
fun_fact: Has a surprisingly deep mystery storyline!

title: Gossip Harbor: Merge Game
description: Merge items while uncovering town scandals.
fun_fact: Combines merge gameplay with soap opera drama!

title: EverMerge
description: Merge to wake fairytale heroes and build kingdoms.
fun_fact: Features Cinderella, Red Riding Hood, and more!

title: Trivia Crack
description: Challenge friends to trivia battles.
fun_fact: Over 450 million players worldwide!

title: Trivia Crack 2
description: Enhanced trivia with new game modes.
fun_fact: Features team battles!

title: QuizPlanet
description: Real-time trivia battles with players worldwide.
fun_fact: Live multiplayer trivia matches!

title: Word Cookies
description: Connect letters to find hidden words.
fun_fact: Over 3,000 levels to solve!

title: Word Connect
description: Swipe to connect letters and form words.
fun_fact: New puzzles added daily!

title: Wordle
description: The viral daily word guessing game.
fun_fact: Created by one developer for his partner!

title: Scrabble GO
description: The classic word game reimagined for mobile.
fun_fact: Official Scrabble with new game modes!

title: Words With Friends 2
description: Play word games with friends and family.
fun_fact: Over 200 million players!

title: Picross Luna
description: Beautiful nonogram puzzles with a charming story.
fun_fact: Features a touching story about the moon!

title: Nonograms Katana
description: Thousands of nonogram picture puzzles.
fun_fact: Over 8,000 puzzles to solve!

title: Brain Test: Tricky Puzzles
description: Trick questions and mind-bending puzzles.
fun_fact: Think outside the box - tap anywhere!

title: Brain Test 2: Tricky Stories
description: Story-based trick puzzles with characters.
fun_fact: Each story has unique puzzle mechanics!

title: The Impossible Game
description: One-button rhythm platformer - incredibly hard!
fun_fact: Inspired Geometry Dash and many others!

title: Flappy Bird Family
description: The infamous bird-flapping game returns.
fun_fact: The original was pulled at peak popularity!

title: Stack
description: Stack blocks as high as you can with perfect timing.
fun_fact: Simple but incredibly satisfying!

title: Helix Jump
description: Bounce through helix tower platforms.
fun_fact: Over 500 million downloads!

title: Color Switch
description: Pass through matching colors - sounds easy!
fun_fact: Spent months at #1 on app stores!

title: Rise Up
description: Protect your balloon from obstacles as it rises.
fun_fact: Uniquely calming arcade gameplay!

title: Hole.io
description: Control a black hole and consume everything.
fun_fact: Became a viral sensation!

title: Paper.io 2
description: Claim territory by drawing paths - avoid enemies!
fun_fact: Sequel to the hit territory game!

title: Slither.io
description: Grow your snake by eating - avoid hitting others!
fun_fact: Modern take on the classic Snake game!

title: Agar.io
description: Eat smaller cells to grow - avoid bigger ones!
fun_fact: Started the .io game phenomenon!

title: Diep.io
description: Tank shooter with upgrades and evolution.
fun_fact: From the creator of Agar.io!

title: Surviv.io
description: 2D battle royale in your browser or app.
fun_fact: Quick battle royale matches under 5 minutes!

title: aquapark.io
description: Race down waterslides against other players.
fun_fact: Push opponents off the slide!

title: Crowd City
description: Build the biggest crowd by converting people.
fun_fact: Simple concept, surprisingly addictive!

title: Pocket Mortys
description: Collect and battle Mortys in Pokemon-style gameplay.

title: Family Guy: Quest for Stuff
description: Rebuild Quahog with your favorite characters.

title: The Simpsons: Tapped Out
description: Rebuild Springfield in this city-building sim.

title: Futurama: Worlds of Tomorrow
description: Build New New York with the Planet Express crew.
